---
title: "White Random Laser based on a Ho3+/Tm3+/Yb3+ doped GeO2-PbO glass"
date: 2025-12-01
author:
  - name: Dipold, Jessica
  - name: De Araújo, Cid B.
  - name: Kassab, Luciana R.P.
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus U.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Journal of Luminescence"
  volume: 288
  doi: "10.1016/j.jlumin.2025.121540"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">White Random Laser based on a Ho3+/Tm3+/Yb3+ doped GeO2-PbO glass</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
